Query1_PropertyHistoryTracking.description: Property history tracking: Track all property change history for a specified parcel within a specified time range

cypher.A:
MATCH (p:Parcel {id: $bbl})
UNWIND COALESCE(p.AssessTot_history, []) AS chunk
WITH p, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk) AS hist
WHERE hist.start >= $start_year AND hist.start <= $end_year
RETURN 'AssessTot' AS attribute, hist.value AS value, hist.start AS change_time
ORDER BY hist.start
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:Parcel_State {id: $bbl})
WHERE s.start >= $start_year AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end <= $end_year)
RETURN 'AssessTot' AS attribute, s.AssessTot AS value, s.start AS change_time
ORDER BY s.start
cypher.C:
MATCH (p:Parcel {id: $bbl})-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'AssessTot'}]->(head:ProcessNode)
MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
WHERE node.start >= $start_year AND (node.end IS NULL OR node.end <= $end_year)
RETURN 'AssessTot' AS attribute, node.value AS value, node.start AS change_time
ORDER BY node.start

Query2_TopologyEvolutionPath.description: Topology evolution path query: Track the topology evolution path of a specified parcel (split, merge, re-identification)

cypher.A:
MATCH (p:Parcel {id: $bbl})-[r:SPLIT_INTO|MERGED_INTO|REID_AS]->(target:Parcel)
RETURN type(r) AS relation_type, target.id AS target_bbl, r.start AS evolution_time
ORDER BY r.start
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:Parcel_State {id: $bbl})-[r:SPLIT_INTO|MERGED_INTO|REID_AS]->(target:Parcel_State)
RETURN type(r) AS relation_type, target.id AS target_bbl, s.start AS evolution_time
ORDER BY s.start
cypher.C:
MATCH (p:Parcel {id: $bbl})-[:HAS_PROCESS]->(head:ProcessNode)
WHERE head.attr IN ['SPLIT_INTO', 'MERGED_INTO', 'REID_AS']
MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(pn:ProcessNode)
WHERE pn.attr IN ['SPLIT_INTO', 'MERGED_INTO', 'REID_AS']
MATCH (pn)-[r:SPLIT_INTO|MERGED_INTO|REID_AS]->(target:Parcel)
RETURN type(r) AS relation_type, target.id AS target_bbl, pn.start AS evolution_time
ORDER BY pn.start

Query3_SpatioTemporalJointQuery.description: Spatio-temporal joint query: At a specified time point, find parcels satisfying specific attribute conditions and their topology relationships

cypher.A:
MATCH (p:Parcel)
UNWIND COALESCE(p['AssessTot_history'], []) AS chunk1
WITH p, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk1) AS hist1
WHERE hist1.start <= $time AND (hist1.end IS NULL OR hist1.end >= $time)
  AND toFloat(hist1.value) > $min_assess
UNWIND COALESCE(p['LandUse_history'], []) AS chunk2
WITH p, hist1, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk2) AS hist2
WHERE hist2.start <= $time AND (hist2.end IS NULL OR hist2.end >= $time)
  AND hist2.value = $landuse
MATCH (p)-[r:SPLIT_INTO|MERGED_INTO|REID_AS]->(target:Parcel)
WHERE r.start <= $time AND (r.end IS NULL OR r.end >= $time)
RETURN p.id AS bbl, target.id AS related_bbl, type(r) AS relation_type
LIMIT 100
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:Parcel_State)
WHERE s.start <= $time AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end >= $time)
  AND toFloat(s.AssessTot) > $min_assess
  AND s.LandUse = $landuse
MATCH (s)-[r:SPLIT_INTO|MERGED_INTO|REID_AS]->(target:Parcel_State)
WHERE s.start <= $time AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end >= $time)
RETURN s.id AS bbl, target.id AS related_bbl, type(r) AS relation_type
LIMIT 100
cypher.C:
MATCH (p:Parcel)
WITH p, $time AS time_val
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'AssessTot'}]->(head1:ProcessNode)
CALL (head1, time_val) {
  WITH head1, time_val
  MATCH (head1)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node1:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node1.start <= time_val AND (node1.end IS NULL OR node1.end >= time_val)
  RETURN node1 ORDER BY node1.start DESC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p, node1, time_val
WHERE node1 IS NOT NULL AND toFloat(node1.value) > $min_assess
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'LandUse'}]->(head2:ProcessNode)
CALL (head2, time_val) {
  WITH head2, time_val
  MATCH (head2)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node2:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node2.start <= time_val AND (node2.end IS NULL OR node2.end >= time_val)
  RETURN node2 ORDER BY node2.start DESC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p, node1, node2, time_val
WHERE node2 IS NOT NULL AND node2.value = $landuse
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_PROCESS]->(head_rel:ProcessNode)
WHERE head_rel.attr IN ['SPLIT_INTO', 'MERGED_INTO', 'REID_AS']
MATCH (head_rel)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(pn:ProcessNode)
WHERE pn.attr = head_rel.attr
  AND pn.start <= time_val AND (pn.end IS NULL OR pn.end >= time_val)
MATCH (pn)-[r]->(target:Parcel)
WHERE type(r) IN ['SPLIT_INTO', 'MERGED_INTO', 'REID_AS']
RETURN p.id AS bbl, target.id AS related_bbl, type(r) AS relation_type
LIMIT 100
